tools.description:
Analyze the current timeline frame using Gemini vision AI.

Exports the frame at the playhead and sends it to Gemini for analysis.
Requires GEMINI_API_KEY to be set.
tools.name: cutmaster_analyze_frame

prompt.default: Describe this video frame in detail, including composition, lighting, color palette, and any text visible.
prompt.description: Custom analysis prompt. Default provides a comprehensive description.

tools.description: Append clips from the media pool to the end of the current timeline.
tools.name: cutmaster_append_clips_to_timeline

clip_names.description: List of clip names to append.

tools.description:
Append a batch of ranged subclips to the current timeline.

Each segment must contain ``source_item_id``, ``start_frame``, and
``end_frame``. Optional ``track_index`` (default 1) and ``media_type``
(``'video'``, ``'audio'``, or ``'both'``; default ``'both'``).

Linked audio follows the video by default — pass ``media_type='video'``
to restrict to V-only, or ``'audio'`` for A-only.

Returns a JSON payload with ``appended`` count, per-segment debug, and
any segment-level errors.
tools.name: cutmaster_append_subclips_with_ranges

tools.description: Apply a grade from a .drx file to timeline items.
tools.name: cutmaster_apply_grade_from_drx

tools.description: Archive a project to a .dra file with optional media.
tools.name: cutmaster_archive_project

tools.description:
Create a timeline from all clips in a bin with track configuration.

This workflow:
1. Creates a timeline from the bin's clips
2. Sets up the requested number of video/audio tracks
3. Names the tracks automatically
tools.name: cutmaster_assembly_from_bin

audio_tracks.description: Number of audio tracks to create (min 1).

video_tracks.description: Number of video tracks to create (min 1).

tools.description: Assign a timeline item to a color group.
tools.name: cutmaster_assign_to_color_group

tools.description: Apply a LUT to multiple timeline items at once.
tools.name: cutmaster_batch_apply_lut

item_indices.description: 0-based indices of items. Applies to all if omitted.

node_index.description: 1-based node index to apply the LUT to.

tools.description:
Queue multiple renders with different presets and start them all.

Useful for delivering multiple formats at once (e.g. h264 for web,
prores422hq for archive, proxylt for editing).
tools.name: cutmaster_batch_deliver

output_path.description: Base output directory. Each preset gets a subfolder.

tools.description: List sub-folders in a media storage path.
tools.name: cutmaster_browse_storage

tools.description:
Apply chroma key (green/blue screen removal) to timeline clips via Fusion DeltaKeyer.

Builds a Fusion composition with a DeltaKeyer node that keys out the
specified background color. Works with any solid-color backdrop — green
screen, blue screen, or custom colors.

Presets: 'green', 'blue', 'bright-green' (#00FF00), 'chroma-green'
(studio green), 'chroma-blue' (studio blue).

For custom key colors, set key_color_r/g/b (0.0–1.0 range) — these
override the preset.

The node chain is: MediaIn → DeltaKeyer → MediaOut.
tools.name: cutmaster_chroma_key

apply_to_all.description: True to apply to every clip on the track.

balance.description: Keyer balance (-1.0 to 1.0). Adjusts matte edge. Default 0.0.

clean_bg.description: Clean background amount (0.0–1.0). Removes background remnants. Default 0.05.

clean_fg.description: Clean foreground amount (0.0–1.0). Solidifies the subject. Default 0.05.

erode.description: Matte edge erosion. Positive shrinks, negative expands. Default 0.001.

gain.description: Keyer gain — higher values key more aggressively. Default 1.0.

key_color.description: Color preset name. See presets above.

key_color_r.description: Custom key red (0.0–1.0). Set all three to override preset.

tools.description: Clear the clip color label from a media pool clip.
tools.name: cutmaster_clear_clip_color

tools.description: Clear flags from a timeline item.
tools.name: cutmaster_clear_item_flags

color.description: Flag color to clear, or empty to clear all.

tools.description: Close the current project (returns to Project Manager).
tools.name: cutmaster_close_project

tools.description:
Get AI-powered color correction suggestions for the current frame.

Exports the frame, sends it to Gemini for visual analysis, and returns
CDL (slope/offset/power/saturation) recommendations. Optionally applies
them directly.

Works standalone OR within the 6-node log grading structure
(use `six_node_mode=True` after running `cutmaster_setup_log_grade`).
In 6-node mode, corrections are applied to the correct nodes:
white balance → WB (node 1), exposure → EXP (node 2), etc.
tools.name: cutmaster_color_assist

apply.description: If True, apply the suggested CDL values to the clip.

intent.description:
What look are you going for? (e.g. 'warm cinematic',
    'cool desaturated', 'neutral balance', 'punchy contrast').
    Leave empty for auto-correction suggestions.

node.description:
Which node to apply CDL to. 'auto' applies to node 1 (or the
  node best suited in 6-node mode). Use 'wb', 'exp', 'sat', 'curves'
  to target specific 6-node structure nodes, or an integer like '2'.

six_node_mode.description:
True when working within the 6-node log grading structure
           (set up by cutmaster_setup_log_grade). AI will give advice
           tailored to each node's role rather than a single CDL.

track_type.description: Track type for the target clip.

tools.description:
Compare the current frame to a reference image.

Exports the current frame and sends both images to Gemini for comparison.
Useful for color matching, continuity checking, or A/B review.
tools.name: cutmaster_compare_frames

comparison_prompt.description: Custom comparison prompt. Default compares color and composition.

reference_path.description: Path to the reference image file.

tools.description:
Import a timeline file and relink to source media.

This workflow:
1. Imports a timeline from EDL/XML/AAF/FCPXML/OTIO
2. Optionally relinks offline clips to media at the specified path
3. Reports conforming status (online vs offline clips)
tools.name: cutmaster_conform_timeline

media_path.description: Path to source media for relinking. Skip relinking if empty.

timeline_path.description: Path to the timeline file (EDL, XML, AAF, FCPXML, OTIO).

tools.description:
Import media from a folder into the media pool with optional organisation.

This workflow:
1. Scans the source path for media files
2. Creates the target bin if requested
3. Imports all matching files into the bin
4. Optionally sets metadata on all imported clips
tools.name: cutmaster_ingest_media

create_bin.description: Create the target bin if it doesn't exist.

set_metadata.description:
Optional dict of metadata to apply to all imported clips
          (e.g. {"Scene": "1", "Comments": "Interview"}).

source_path.description: Absolute path to folder or file(s) to import.

target_bin.description: Target bin path (e.g. 'Footage/Day1'). Uses current bin if empty.

tools.description:
Import media and auto-organise into bins based on folder structure.

Creates bins mirroring the source directory structure and imports
each folder's media into its corresponding bin.
tools.name: cutmaster_ingest_with_bins

bin_by.description:
Organisation strategy — 'subfolder' creates bins matching
    the source folder structure.

tools.description: Open an existing project by name.
tools.name: cutmaster_open_project

tools.description: Navigate into a Project Manager folder.
tools.name: cutmaster_open_project_folder

tools.description:
Create a timeline and add clips to it in one step.

This workflow:
1. Creates a new empty timeline
2. Finds the specified clips (or all clips from a bin)
3. Appends them to the timeline in order
tools.name: cutmaster_quick_assembly

bin_path.description: Bin to pull clips from (used when clip_names is empty).

clip_names.description: Specific clip names to add. If empty, adds all clips from bin_path.

tools.description:
One-command render: set format, configure output, queue, and start.

This workflow:
1. Switches to the Deliver page
2. Sets the render format/codec from a preset shorthand
3. Configures the output path and filename
4. Adds the job to the render queue
5. Starts rendering
tools.name: cutmaster_quick_deliver

filename.description: Output filename (without extension). Defaults to timeline name.

preset.description:
Render shorthand — h264, h265, prores422, prores422hq,
    prores4444, proxylt, dnxhd, dnxhr, tiff, dpx, exr.
    Or a custom Resolve render preset name.

tools.description:
Apply a LUT and/or CDL to a timeline item in one step.

This workflow:
1. Gets the item's node graph
2. Applies a LUT to node 1 (if lut_path provided)
3. Sets CDL values (if non-default values provided)
4. Labels the node
5. Optionally grabs a still to the gallery
tools.name: cutmaster_quick_grade

grab_still.description: Grab a still of the result to the gallery.

lut_path.description: Path to a LUT file (.cube, .3dl). Skip if empty.

tools.description: Refresh the media pool folder structure.
tools.name: cutmaster_refresh_bins

tools.description: Refresh the project's LUT list (re-scan LUT directories).
tools.name: cutmaster_refresh_lut_list

tools.description: Relink clips to a new media path.
tools.name: cutmaster_relink_clips

clip_names.description: List of clip names to relink.

new_path.description: New base path for the media files.

tools.description:
Relink all offline clips in a bin to media at a new path.

Scans the media pool for clips without valid file paths and
attempts to relink them to files in the specified directory.
tools.name: cutmaster_relink_offline_clips

bin_path.description: Bin to scan. Scans entire pool if empty.

tools.description: Rename a Fusion composition.
tools.name: cutmaster_rename_fusion_comp

tools.description: Rename a grade version.
tools.name: cutmaster_rename_version

tools.description:
Check the status of all render jobs in the queue.

Returns each job's completion percentage, status, and timing.
tools.name: cutmaster_render_status

tools.description: Replace a clip's media with a different file.
tools.name: cutmaster_replace_clip

new_path.description: Path to the replacement media file.

tools.description: Map a timeline time (seconds) to the source clip + source frame playing then.
tools.name: cutmaster_resolve_timeline_time_to_source

seconds.description: Timeline time in seconds (0 = start of timeline).

tools.description: Restore a project from a .dra archive.
tools.name: cutmaster_restore_project

name.description: Optional name for the restored project.

tools.description: Reveal a file or folder in the Media Storage browser.
tools.name: cutmaster_reveal_in_storage

tools.description: Save the current UI layout as a preset.
tools.name: cutmaster_save_layout_preset

tools.description: Save the current project.
tools.name: cutmaster_save_project

tools.description: Save current render settings as a new preset.
tools.name: cutmaster_save_render_preset

tools.description:
Scan the Resolve LUT folders and show all installed LUTs.

Checks both the system LUT folder and the CutMaster user LUT folder.
Useful for finding LUTs you've already installed manually.
tools.name: cutmaster_scan_lut_folder

tools.description: Search for clips by name substring (case-insensitive).
tools.name: cutmaster_search_clips

bin_path.description: Optionally limit search to a specific bin.

query.description: Search string to match against clip names.

tools.description: Convert timeline-seconds to an absolute timeline frame on the current timeline.
tools.name: cutmaster_seconds_to_frame

seconds.description: Time in seconds, relative to the timeline start.

tools.description: Select a specific take on a timeline item.
tools.name: cutmaster_select_take

tools.description: Set the volume of an audio track.
tools.name: cutmaster_set_audio_track_volume

tools.description: Set CDL values on a timeline item.
tools.name: cutmaster_set_cdl

tools.description: Set the clip color label on a media pool clip.
tools.name: cutmaster_set_clip_color

color.description:
Color name (Orange, Apricot, Yellow, Lime, Olive, Green, Teal,
   Navy, Blue, Purple, Violet, Pink, Tan, Beige, Brown, Chocolate).

tools.description: Enable or disable a timeline item.
tools.name: cutmaster_set_clip_enabled

enabled.description: True to enable, False to disable.

tools.description: Set a metadata field on a media pool clip.
tools.name: cutmaster_set_clip_metadata

tools.description: Set a property on a media pool clip.
tools.name: cutmaster_set_clip_property

tools.description: Set the composite/blend mode on a timeline item.
tools.name: cutmaster_set_composite_mode

mode.description: Blend mode (Normal, Add, Multiply, Screen, Overlay, etc.).

tools.description: Set crop values on a timeline item.
tools.name: cutmaster_set_crop

tools.description: Set the current still album by index.
tools.name: cutmaster_set_current_album

tools.description: Set the current bin by name or path (e.g. 'Master/Footage/Day1').
tools.name: cutmaster_set_current_bin

bin_path.description: Bin name or /-separated path from root.

tools.description: Switch to a timeline by name.
tools.name: cutmaster_set_current_timeline

tools.description: Apply a LUT to a node in a color group's pre/post-clip graph.
tools.name: cutmaster_set_group_graph_lut

tools.description: Set the clip color on a timeline item.
tools.name: cutmaster_set_item_clip_color

tools.description:
Set a property on a timeline item.

Common keys: Pan, Tilt, ZoomX, ZoomY, ZoomGang, RotationAngle,
AnchorPointX, AnchorPointY, Pitch, Yaw, FlipX, FlipY,
CropLeft, CropRight, CropTop, CropBottom, CropSoftness, CropRetain,
CompositeMode, Opacity, RetimeProcess, SpeedFactor,
ScalingPreset, ResizeFilter
tools.name: cutmaster_set_item_property

tools.description: Set the keyframe mode.
tools.name: cutmaster_set_keyframe_mode

tools.description: Apply a LUT to a color node.
tools.name: cutmaster_set_lut

lut_path.description: Absolute path to the LUT file (.cube, .3dl, etc.).

tools.description: Set the cache mode on a color node.
tools.name: cutmaster_set_node_cache_mode

tools.description: Enable or disable a color node.
tools.name: cutmaster_set_node_enabled

enabled.description: True to enable, False to disable.

tools.description: Set the label on a color node.
tools.name: cutmaster_set_node_label

tools.description: Set the opacity of a timeline item (0.0 to 100.0).
tools.name: cutmaster_set_opacity

tools.description: Set the playhead to a specific timecode.
tools.name: cutmaster_set_playhead_position

tools.description: Set a project setting.
tools.name: cutmaster_set_project_setting

tools.description: Set the current render format and codec.
tools.name: cutmaster_set_render_format_and_codec

tools.description: Set render settings.
tools.name: cutmaster_set_render_settings

settings.description:
Dictionary of settings to apply. Common keys:
- TargetDir: Output directory path
- CustomName: Output file name
- FormatWidth / FormatHeight: Resolution
- FrameRate: Output frame rate
- MarkIn / MarkOut: Frame range
- IsExportVideo / IsExportAudio: Include video/audio

tools.description: Set the playback speed of a timeline item.
tools.name: cutmaster_set_speed

speed.description: Speed factor (1.0 = normal, 0.5 = half speed, 2.0 = double).

tools.description: Set the label on a still in the current album.
tools.name: cutmaster_set_still_label

tools.description: Rename the current timeline.
tools.name: cutmaster_set_timeline_name

tools.description: Enable or disable a track.
tools.name: cutmaster_set_track_enabled

enabled.description: True to enable, False to disable.

tools.description: Lock or unlock a track.
tools.name: cutmaster_set_track_lock

locked.description: True to lock, False to unlock.

tools.description: Rename a track.
tools.name: cutmaster_set_track_name

tools.description:
Set transform properties on a timeline item in one call.

All parameters are optional — only provided values are applied.
tools.name: cutmaster_set_transform

tools.description:
Set up the 6-node log footage grading structure on a clip or all clips.

Works with ANY camera that shoots in a log profile — Sony, ARRI, Blackmagic,
RED, DJI (both D-Log and D-Log M), Panasonic, Olympus, Samsung, iPhone,
GoPro, Insta360, and more. Natural camera names and aliases all work.
tools.name: cutmaster_setup_log_grade

apply_to_all.description: True to apply to every clip on the track.

camera.description:
Camera name or log format key. Natural names work (see above).
    Use 'none' or 'manual' to skip CST entirely.

cst_lut_path.description:
Override — absolute path to any .cube file to use as the CST.
          Use this if you've downloaded the manufacturer's LUT
          (e.g. DJI D-Log M LUT, Insta360 LUT, GoPro LUT).

look_lut.description:
Look LUT for node 6:
      'decsfilm' — DECSFILM.cube (your custom LUT, installed)
      'kodak2383', 'fuji3513-d55', 'fuji3513-d60', 'fuji3513-d65'
      Or an absolute .cube file path. Use 'none' to skip.

lut_gain.description:
Key Output Gain for node 6 (0.0–1.0). Default 0.20.
      The 'secret' — keeps the LUT subtle. Range: 0.10–0.30.

set_color_management.description: Set project timeline + output color space to Rec.709-A.

tools.description:
Export the current project to a .drp snapshot (non-destructive backup).

Use before any destructive or large-scale timeline operation. If the user
hates the result, they can re-import the .drp via Resolve's Project
Manager.
tools.name: cutmaster_snapshot_project

label.description: Short label baked into the filename (default ``pre_cutmaster``).

tools.description: Start rendering jobs in the queue.
tools.name: cutmaster_start_render

job_ids.description: Specific job IDs to render (all if omitted).

tools.description: Stop the current render.
tools.name: cutmaster_stop_render

tools.description:
AI analyzes the timeline and suggests where markers should be placed.

Returns a list of suggested markers with frame positions, colors,
and notes. Does NOT add them — use cutmaster_add_timeline_marker to apply.
tools.name: cutmaster_suggest_markers

criteria.default: Mark any clips shorter than 1 second, any gaps, and any jump cuts.
criteria.description:
What to look for (e.g. 'short clips', 'gaps',
      'potential b-roll positions', 'rhythm changes').

tools.description: Switch to a different database.
tools.name: cutmaster_switch_database

tools.description:
Switch to a Resolve page.

Valid pages: media, cut, edit, fusion, color, fairlight, deliver
tools.name: cutmaster_switch_page

tools.description:
Get AI editorial feedback on the current timeline.

Analyzes the timeline structure (clip order, durations, pacing)
and provides editorial suggestions. Does not analyze visual content
unless combined with frame analysis.
tools.name: cutmaster_timeline_critique

focus.description:
Specific aspect to focus on — 'pacing', 'structure',
   'transitions', 'audio', or empty for general feedback.

tools.description: Unlink clips from their media files (make offline).
tools.name: cutmaster_unlink_clips

clip_names.description: List of clip names to unlink.

tools.description: Unlink proxy media from a clip.
tools.name: cutmaster_unlink_proxy_media

tools.description: Update an existing layout preset with the current UI state.
tools.name: cutmaster_update_layout_preset

tools.description: Update the custom data on a timeline marker.
tools.name: cutmaster_update_timeline_marker_custom_data

tools.description:
Verify that all clips in the current timeline are online.

Reports any offline or missing media with clip names and track positions.
tools.name: cutmaster_verify_timeline_media

tools.description:
Check visual continuity by analyzing frames at each cut point.

Exports frames before and after each cut on video track 1 and uses
Gemini to flag potential continuity issues.

Note: This tool makes multiple Gemini API calls (one per cut point)
and may take some time on long timelines.
tools.name: cutmaster_visual_continuity_check

tools.description:
Apply voice isolation to an audio track (Studio only).

Isolates dialogue from background noise.
tools.name: cutmaster_voice_isolation
